name: Tangy Lemon Orzo
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red bell pepper, seeded and finely diced
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick skillet, heat 2 tablespoons olive oil over medium heat.
Add the green onions and bell pepper; sauté for 1 minute. Add the red pepper flakes and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add water and increase heat to medium. Cook vegetables for 3 to 4 minutes, or until tender.
2. Drain the cooked orzo and add it to the skillet with the vegetables. Stir in remaining olive oil, parsley, lemon juice, salt, and pepper; cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until the orzo is heated through and has absorbed some of the flavors, about 3 minutes.
3. If using Parmesan cheese, stir it in before serving.
